name: Martha Argerich
abstract: Martha Argerich (Argentine Spanish pronunciation: [ˈmaɾta aɾxeˈɾitʃ]; Eastern Catalan: [əɾʒəˈɾik]; born 5 June 1941) is an Argentine classical concert pianist. She is widely considered to be one of the greatest living  pianists.

about_quotes.speaker: Chick Corea
about_quotes.evidence: I found myself in this group of Martha Argerich... I just did my thing; I improvised and so forth.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chick Corea — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Dorothy Donegan
about_quotes.evidence: I’d go hear Peterson, Martha Argerich, some of those Russian pianists play.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dorothy Donegan — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
